testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-sessions > renders active sessions with current-device labelling and revoke actions
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > defines stable injection tokens for the sessions client and adapter
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > normalizes SDK session payloads, derives the current session, and calls SDK endpoints
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > normalizes missing SDK fields without requiring an auth session provider
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > uses snapshot sid before token claims and ignores empty token sid claims
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > fails fast when the SDK adapter is used without a client provider
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > provides a default SDK adapter and allows explicit adapter overrides
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > loads active sessions with current-device, metadata, and empty-state behavior
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > revokes sessions, reloads state, clears busy state, and emits translated warning toasts
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > keeps busy state true until revoke operations settle
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > falls back to untranslated toast keys when no i18n provider is configured
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > throws a clear error when no adapter is provided
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > prefers an input adapter over the provider adapter
@stynx-web/angular-sessions > accepts an input adapter without a provider adapter
